title: Elderly woman murdered near Velliyanai
summary: A 79-year-old woman was found murdered in her home, jewellery stolen; police suspect robbery motive and continue investigation in Karur district.

title: Political reactions intensify after murder
summary: PMK leader Anbumani Ramadoss criticizes state government over law and order following Karur murder, calling for urgent action to ensure public safety.

title: Counting staff training held in Karur
summary: Election officials underwent training at Karur collectorate ahead of vote counting scheduled for May 4, emphasizing accuracy and transparency.

title: Vote counting preparations underway
summary: Authorities finalize arrangements for counting at M Kumarasamy College, deploying over 200 officials to manage election result processes efficiently.

title: High voter turnout recorded in Karur
summary: Karur district recorded one of Tamil Nadu’s highest voter turnout percentages in recent assembly elections, reflecting strong voter participation.

title: Water supply concerns persist nearby
summary: Residents in nearby Kulithalai region protested erratic drinking water supply, highlighting ongoing water management issues affecting Karur belt.

title: Police intensify investigation in murder case
summary: Karur police teams expand search operations and forensic analysis to identify suspects involved in the elderly woman murder case.

title: Postal ballots processing continues
summary: Election officials coordinate with Trichy center to manage postal ballot sorting and distribution for Karur district ahead of counting day.

title: Public concern rises over safety
summary: Residents express concern over personal safety following recent murder incident, urging stronger policing and neighborhood vigilance across Karur.

title: Police patrols increased in rural areas
summary: Authorities increase patrols in rural Karur villages after recent crime, aiming to reassure residents and prevent further incidents.

title: Heatwave conditions continue in Karur
summary: Karur experiences sustained high temperatures, with heatwave conditions impacting daily life and increasing health risks for residents.

title: Hospitals report rise in heat cases
summary: Medical facilities in Karur note increasing cases of dehydration and heat exhaustion as temperatures remain above seasonal averages.

title: Water demand rises amid heatwave
summary: Municipal authorities monitor water usage closely as demand surges due to ongoing high temperatures across Karur district.

title: Power consumption spikes in district
summary: Electricity demand increases sharply in Karur as residents rely heavily on cooling appliances during extreme summer conditions.

title: Cooling appliance sales surge locally
summary: Retailers report increased demand for fans, air coolers, and air conditioners amid continuing heatwave conditions.

title: Farmers concerned over irrigation stress
summary: Farmers report difficulties maintaining irrigation schedules due to rising temperatures and declining water availability.

title: Fruit sales increase during heat
summary: Demand for watermelon, tender coconut, and citrus fruits rises sharply as residents seek hydration options.

title: Daytime traffic drops in town
summary: Reduced vehicular movement observed in Karur during peak afternoon hours due to extreme heat conditions.

title: Evening activity increases in markets
summary: Public activity shifts to evenings as residents avoid outdoor exposure during daytime heat in Karur.

title: Schools implement heat precautions
summary: Educational institutions reduce outdoor activities and adjust schedules to protect students from heat exposure.

title: Water levels decline in reservoirs
summary: Local water bodies show reduced levels due to evaporation under prolonged summer heat conditions.

title: Small businesses adjust timings
summary: Traders modify working hours to mornings and evenings to adapt to declining daytime customer turnout.

title: Doctors warn against heatstroke risks
summary: Health officials advise hydration and limited sun exposure to prevent heat-related illnesses during ongoing heatwave.

title: Crowds increase at water points
summary: Public water distribution points see higher usage as residents cope with heat and rising water demand.

title: Pipeline inspections intensified
summary: Municipal teams conduct checks to prevent water leakage and ensure efficient distribution during peak demand.

title: Juice shops see higher sales
summary: Cooling beverage outlets report increased business as residents seek relief from high temperatures.

title: Auto drivers report fewer trips
summary: Auto-rickshaw drivers experience reduced daytime demand as residents avoid travel in extreme heat.

title: Waste collection continues with adjustments
summary: Municipal workers adjust schedules to manage waste collection safely during high-temperature conditions.

title: Livestock affected by heat stress
summary: Farmers report increased stress among livestock due to rising temperatures, requiring additional water and care.

title: Dust levels rise across district
summary: Dry weather conditions contribute to increased dust levels in urban and rural parts of Karur.

title: Residents limit daytime movement
summary: People stay indoors during peak hours, impacting public spaces and reducing daytime activity across Karur.

title: Retail footfall declines midday
summary: Shops report reduced customer visits during afternoon hours due to intense heatwave conditions.

title: Construction work slows down
summary: Construction activities are limited to early hours as workers avoid extreme heat during daytime.

title: Pharmacies report increased ORS demand
summary: Medical stores note higher sales of hydration products as residents manage heat-related health concerns.

title: Evening parks see more visitors
summary: Public parks witness increased footfall during cooler evening hours as residents seek outdoor relief.

title: Authorities urge water conservation
summary: Officials advise residents to conserve water as supply pressure increases during peak summer demand.

title: Safety monitoring increased at hotspots
summary: Police monitor crowded public areas and water points to maintain order and prevent disputes.

title: Bus services continue without disruption
summary: Public transport operates normally though ridership dips during afternoon hours due to heat.

title: Local economy remains stable
summary: Despite weather challenges, Karur’s textile and small industries maintain steady business operations.

title: Exams continue with precautions
summary: Institutions implement heat safety measures while conducting examinations across Karur district.

title: Indoor activities increase among residents
summary: Residents prefer indoor activities as extreme temperatures discourage outdoor engagement during daytime.

title: Cooling foods gain popularity
summary: Demand rises for buttermilk, juices, and light meals as residents adapt diets to cope with heat.

title: Tourist inflow remains low
summary: Karur sees reduced tourist visits as travelers prefer cooler destinations during peak summer heat.

title: Public complaints on water rise
summary: Authorities receive increased grievances related to water shortages and supply issues in Karur.

title: Crop stress concerns grow
summary: Farmers anticipate reduced yields if extreme heat persists into early May without rainfall support.

title: Shade areas become crowded
summary: Residents gather under shaded locations and trees to escape intense sunlight during peak hours.

title: Water tanker demand increases
summary: More areas rely on tanker services as municipal supply struggles to meet rising summer demand.

title: Power supply monitored closely
summary: Officials track grid performance to prevent outages amid surging electricity consumption.

title: Morning activities increase
summary: Residents shift routines to early morning hours to avoid midday heat exposure.

title: No immediate rainfall relief forecast
summary: Weather forecasts indicate continued dry conditions, offering little relief from ongoing heatwave in Karur region.
